description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for Robotoff that runs unit tests and deployments. Trigger on push to robotoff/ and on pull requests affecting robotoff/, .pot, or .po files. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest across Python 3.6 and 3.7, checking out the code, setting up Python, compiling translations, installing dependencies, caching and downloading OCR predictor weight files, and running tests with pytest, flake8, black, and mypy.
